__APP_NAME__ · κ-block disk__NINEP_TAG__ disk: — ● starting
κ-anchored: …v86 engine — …BIOS — …disk (κ-block DAG) —
WebGPU
🖱 click to capture mouse · Esc to release
__APP_NAME__ — a real OS on v86, disk = a content-addressed κ-DAG
The v86 engine, its BIOSes, and the disk are each content-addressed. The disk is an ordered set of κ-blocks; v86 reads it lazily and a service worker re-derives every block before the guest sees a byte (Law L5). Only blocks the guest touches are fetched.
loading…
